title: PUT partial-update uses empty/zero as 'unchanged' sentinel
evidence: app.go:200-211 — req.Title!="", req.Year!=0 guards mean a field cannot be explicitly cleared to empty or set to year 0
suggestion: Use pointer fields (*string/*int) to distinguish omitted from zero-valued on PUT

title: Coverage is 59.8%, error/500 paths untested
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.598; app_test.go exercises happy paths + 404/400 but not DB-error 500 branches
suggestion: Add tests injecting a closed/failing DB to cover the 500 branches

title: No ISBN uniqueness or format validation
evidence: app.go:49-56 books table declares isbn TEXT with no UNIQUE constraint; createBookHandler does not validate isbn
suggestion: Optional: add a UNIQUE index and basic ISBN format check if duplicates should be rejected
